step_rationale: Neutrophil extracellular trap (NET) component; NET release amplifies platelet activation and thrombosis.
mechanism: Circulating histone H1 from NETs activates platelets and endothelium, amplifying thrombus formation.

references.title: Neutrophils, neutrophil extracellular traps and interleukin-17 associate with the organisation of thrombi in acute myocardial infarction.
